arts.ttl: 'Irreplaceable, Not Championship standard, Surprise hit, Struggled physically': Neil Allen's Portsmouth mid-season player ratings
arts.sum: The Championship campaign has paused for a weekend as attention turns to the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Struggling ex-Newcastle striker departs Portsmouth after just five months at Fratton Park
arts.sum: Elias Sorensen has left Pompey - after just five months at Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: How Portsmouth can offer career lifeline to forgotten Newcastle United man and ex-Premier League regular shackled by six-year contract
arts.sum: In an attempt to retain their top young talent, Newcastle United unveiled Isaac Hayden and Karl Darlow on long-term deals in September 2020.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth stance on Preston North End midfielder revealed amid reports of January transfer window interest
arts.sum: Pompey have made no approaches to bring Preston North End midfielder Ryan Ledson to Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth facing competition in race for out-of-contract Championship midfielder

arts.ttl: Wycombe Wanderers v Portsmouth: Jordan Cross’ predicted line-up with whopping NINE changes for FA Cup
arts.sum: Pompey turn their attentions to FA Cup action tomorrow at Wycombe.

arts.ttl: He's back. Almost: The positive news Portsmouth faithful have wanted to hear about Fratton favourite
arts.sum: John Mousinho has delivered the news all Pompey fans want to hear - Conor Shaughnessy will be back in training next week.

arts.ttl: Transfer news: Portsmouth 'sell' striker for 300,000 euro after just six months
arts.sum: Pompey have agreed a deal to sell Denmark forward Elias Sorensen, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss details midfield thinking as he prepares to welcome £50,000-a-week Newcastle United man
arts.sum: John Mousinho has welcomed the prospect of landing the ‘right player’ to bolster his midfield as Pompey get set to announce Isaac Hayden’s arrival.
